## Tests

### 1. Overlay manifest generated by compose
expected: bun run compose writes dist/.overlay-manifest.json with overlay-only file list
result: pass

### 2. bin/install.js is v3.0 delegation installer
expected: 436 lines, contains spawn and overlay-manifest references (not 2,125-line v2.x monolith)
result: pass

### 3. preview-update exports
expected: getVersionDelta, runPreviewScan, getOverrideImpact, generateReport all exported as functions
result: pass

### 4. preview-update package.json script
expected: package.json has "preview-update": "node scripts/preview-update.js"
result: pass

### 5. preview-update CLI runs
expected: bun run preview-update outputs "Already up to date (pinned: 1.30.0)" with no errors
result: pass

### 6. End-to-end install with --config-dir isolation
expected: Upstream installs to target, 31 overlay files copied, .install-meta.json written with upstream_version, overlay_version, installed_at, features_disabled, overrides_applied
result: pass

### 7. Uninstall removes target contents
expected: node bin/install.js --uninstall --config-dir removes all files, exits 0
result: pass

### 8. Idempotent uninstall
expected: Running uninstall again on empty dir exits 0 without error
result: pass
